$comment: Software Constitution Standard v1.0 §3.5 + §6 — Implementation Registry template. Replace the placeholders with your project's concepts. Validate against schemas/software-constitution-implementation-registry.v1.json.
notes: Single-Implementation Mandate: every named capability has EXACTLY ONE canonical implementation. Wrappers MUST import the SSOT package.

transport_wrappers.note: HTTP surface around the SSOT — must call the library, never reimplement.
